top_signals.title: The Retail Payments Infrastructure Board launches consultation on the next generation UK payments infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Today marks a major milestone in the modernisation of the UK's payments landscape, with the Retail Payments Infrastructure Board (RPIB) launching a consultation on the future design of the UK's next-generation retail payments infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New analysis on the EU's most threatening criminal networks
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 26 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission, Europol and the Cypriot Presidency of the Council of the EU are presenting a new Europol analysis of the EU's most threatening criminal networks.
